ddls:
CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the cryptocurrency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the cryptocurrency (e.g., BTC, ETH, LTC) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cryptocurrency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "markets" (
  "market_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market */,
  "base_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the base cryptocurrency */,
  "quote_currency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the quote cryptocurrency */,
  "market_name" TEXT /* Name of the market (e.g., BTC/USDT, ETH/EUR) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "institutional_trader" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is an institutional trader */,
  "retail_investor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a retail investor */,
  "data_analyst" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is a data analyst */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the market data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market being accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytic entry */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market this data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the analytic data */,
  "moving_average" REAL /* Moving average of the cryptocurrency price */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price of the cryptocurrency */,
  "price_correlation" REAL /* Price correlation between cryptocurrencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the external data */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the external data (e.g., news feed, economic indicator) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data (e.g., news article, GDP report) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the external data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_news" (
  "news_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the news article */,
  "market_id" INTEGER /* ID of the market the news article is related to */,
  "headline" TEXT /* Headline of the news article */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("news_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_news_market_id FOREIGN KEY ("market_id") REFERENCES markets ("market_id")
)
